title: justicia teucriflora
intro: Justicia teucriflora, also known as the wild serama or serama plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia teucriflora are said to include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Justicia teucriflora include making teas, infusions, and tinctures from its leaves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
